calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-16-2008 Continued To Jan-16-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 611

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-06-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Judge Diane Elan Wick, Clerk Karissa Shaw, Not Reported. (611)

APPEARANCES:
Plaintiff Carmen Perez is present In Pro Per.
Spanish Interpreter Margo Seely appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Sergio Galdames DBA Pyramid Construction & Design is present In Pro Per.
Spanish Interpreter Maria Medina appearing for the defendant.
Defense witness Peter Bermudez.

This matter comes on calendar for a Trial De Novo. All litigants, witnesses and interpreters have been affirmed by the clerk. The court hears testimony and receives evidence from the litigants.

The following plaintiff's exhibit is marked;
Ex. A - Various paperwork and receipts in English and Spanish.

The following defense exhibits are marked;
Ex. 1 - Plastic casing filled with paperwork separated into 8 sections.
Ex. 2 - Design plans completed by Galdamez for the Perez project.

After hearing all testimony, the court takes the matter under submission.

JUDGMENT ENTERED ON 2-6-08.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Nov-14-2007 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Aug-31-2007 Not Served
